data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

'Ivan Kupala' has returned again this year with a new student!
Hurry and set out for the Red Winter Federal Academy, Sensei!

🗓️Period: 10/18 (Tue) - 10/25 (Tue) 01:59 (UTC)
➡️Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101539
